title: tragacantha pungens
intro: Tragacantha pungens, also known as needle thistle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from digestive problems. Tragacantha pungens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various ailments.
